decisions.rationale: Observation maps to base_record_id=corridor_125th-st-manhattan which already exists in the registry and already owns source 2013_03_07_sbs_125th_cb9. The canonical record already represents this observation — no different target record to link to. Evidence confirms same corridor: 'M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street' with 'All intersections from Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue were analyzed', matching the registry record's limits exactly.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M60 Select Bus Service on 125 th Street
All intersections from Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue were analyzed

proposed_relations.description: Both records represent the same 125th Street SBS corridor in Manhattan. corridor_125th-st-manhattan has limits Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue; corridor_125th-street-manhattan has limits Amsterdam Avenue to Second Avenue. The one-block difference at the western end (Amsterdam vs Morningside) is a documentation-level boundary variation within the same SBS project corridor serving M60, M100, M101, Bx15.

evidence_refs.source_quote: All intersections from Morningside Avenue to Second Avenue were analyzed
